case_title: URBAN POINT SF LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. CURRENT FOODS, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URBAN POINT SF LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURRENT FOODS, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1314 FITZGERALD AVENUE, UNITS 1 AND 2 & 1409 EGBERT AVENUE UNITS 1 THROUGH 4, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210054129)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF URBAN POINT SF LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT CURRENT FOODS, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION WICKED FOODS, INC. A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
